project: NTTC-Speech enhancement front-end for robust automatic speech recognition with large amount of training data
title: NTTC-Speech enhancement front-end for robust automatic speech recognition with large amount of training data

czech_title.label: Czech title
czech_title.text: NTTC - Parametrizace s obohacovanim reci pro robustni automaticke rozpoznavani reci s velkym objemem trenovacich dat

keywords.label: Keywords
keywords.text: speech recognition, speaker diarization, large data, robustness

abstract.label: Abstract
abstract.text: The joint research will aim at investigating and developing speech enhancement and speaker diarization techniques for automatic speech recognition systems that are trained using a large amount of training data.

team_members.label: Team members
team_members.text: Burget Lukas, doc. Ing., Ph.D. (DCGM) – research leader Benes Karel, Ing., Ph.D. (FIT) Han Jiangyu (DCGM) Klement Dominik, Ing. (DCGM) Malenovsky Vladimir, Ing., Ph.D. (DCGM) Odehnal Ondrej, Ing. (DCGM) Palka Petr, Ing. (DCGM) Pavlus Jan, Ing. (DCGM)
